🌿 About Me

A people person with a passion for growth and meaningful impact.

I work in the travel industry by day and spend my free time writing stories, exploring ideas, and building communities around shared interests. I believe the best conversations happen when people feel comfortable being themselves — and that's what I try to create wherever I go.

📍
Based in
Bengaluru, India
♥
Loves
Korean Culture, Dramas & Food
✎
Currently
Writing, Learning and Building Community
